title: Kanera — Postgres Query Performance
description: Application SQL activity reported by pg_stat_statements for the selected dashboard range.

panels.title: Slowest queries — mean execution time
panels.description: Application statements with the highest average execution time during the selected dashboard range. Statements with no calls in the range are omitted.

targets.expr: topk(10, (increase(pg_stat_statements_total_exec_time_seconds{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__range]) / clamp_min(increase(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__range]), 1)) and increase(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__range]) > 0)

panels.title: Highest total database time
panels.description: Application statements responsible for the most execution time during the selected dashboard range.

targets.expr: topk(10, increase(pg_stat_statements_total_exec_time_seconds{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__range]) and increase(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__range]) > 0)

panels.title: Most frequently called queries
panels.description: Application statements called most often during the selected dashboard range.

targets.expr: topk(10, increase(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__range]) > 0)

panels.title: Mean execution time trend
panels.description: Rolling average application-query latency calculated from execution-time and call counters. The displayed fingerprints may change as the top ten changes.

targets.expr: topk(10, (rate(pg_stat_statements_total_exec_time_seconds{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__rate_interval]) / clamp_min(rate(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__rate_interval]), 0.000000001)) and rate(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__rate_interval]) > 0)

panels.title: Query call rate
panels.description: Application-query executions per second over Grafana's automatically selected rate interval for the ten busiest fingerprints.

targets.expr: topk(10, rate(pg_stat_statements_calls{query!~"(?i)^(SELECT current_database[(][)] datname, schemaname, relname,|SELECT name, setting, COALESCE[(]unit,)"}[$__rate_interval]) > 0)
